nodes.speaker: Shipbuilder Neri
nodes.text: What's that, the bridge up north? Sorry shape that one's in. I can mend it, but I need five Stonebind Rivets from down in the Stone Vault.

nodes.speaker: Shipbuilder Neri
nodes.text: Let me see what you've brought.

nodes.speaker: Shipbuilder Neri
nodes.text: I'll keep watch for the tide.
